name: Fantasma Football Summer Mini Camp
location: Veterans Field, 4170 Sardis Rd, Murrysville, PA 15668
description:
A 2-day summer mini camp hosted by Fantasma Football. Players ages 7–10 will develop their skills through high-energy technical sessions, fun competitions, and small-sided games in a positive, encouraging environment.

Camp coaches include Connor Hudson, founder of Fantasma Football, and Colton Hudson, head coach of the Fantasma Grove City/Slippery Rock branch and 2025 NCAA D3 All-American.
